ddls:
CREATE TABLE "school_types" (
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of the school (e.g., Public, Charter) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the school type */,
  "is_charter" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the school is a charter school */,
  "is_magnet" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the school is a magnet school */,
  "is_special_education" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the school is a special education school */,
  "is_alternative" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the school is an alternative school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for login (hashed) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, teacher) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" TEXT /* Foreign key to the user_roles table */,
  "permission_id" TEXT /* Foreign key to the permissions table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)
column_names: Type of the school (e.g., Public, Charter)
Indicates whether the school is a charter school
Indicates whether the school is a magnet school
Indicates whether the school is a special education school
Indicates whether the school is an alternative school
Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, teacher)
Timestamp when the user account was created
Timestamp when the user account was last updated
Foreign key to the user_roles table
Foreign key to the permissions table
